headline: Assessing Rollins (ROL) Valuation After Recent Share Price Volatility
summary: Rollins (ROL) is back on investors’ radar after recent trading left the stock around US$47.77. This has prompted fresh interest in how its pest and termite control business performance lines up with today’s valuation. See our latest analysis for Rollins. Recent trading has been choppy, with a 1-day share price return of 0.5% and a 7-day share price return of 4.3%, following a 30-day share price decline of 9.7% and a year to date share price decline of 19.1%.
